evals.name: greenfield-hono
evals.prompt: I just started this Hono API project and I want Claude Code and Cursor to follow my conventions. Can you set this up for me?
evals.expected_output: A lean AGENTS.md (under 120 lines) that mentions bun (not npm), the actual test/lint/typecheck commands from package.json, and follows the primacy/recency anchoring pattern. A CLAUDE.md containing exactly @AGENTS.md.

evals.name: bloated-existing
evals.prompt: My CLAUDE.md is getting out of hand. Can you clean it up?
evals.expected_output: An aggressively pruned AGENTS.md (ideally 60-80 lines, definitely under 120) with the bloat removed: no directory trees, no style guide content, no personality instructions, no code snippets, no self-evident practices. The exact commands and failure-driven rules should survive. CLAUDE.md should become @AGENTS.md.

evals.name: monorepo-ts
evals.prompt: Please restructure the agent instructions for this monorepo following best practices. It's grown too big and mixes cross-cutting rules with package-specific guidance.
evals.expected_output: A lean root AGENTS.md with workspace-level commands and cross-cutting rules only, plus a package map pointing to nested files. Nested AGENTS.md files in apps/web, apps/api, and infra containing only package-specific rules (React/Vite, Hono/Zod, Pulumi respectively). Root CLAUDE.md should be @AGENTS.md. No duplication between root and nested files.
